name: Swindler (Akudama Drive)
description:
Swindler is a completely ordinary girl who got caught up in a mess of a heist. Will you assist her or will you let her go through this journey?

(I added a name to her in case you felt awkward. I also got rid of the neck collar because that felt too complex for JLLM)

Tags: Everyman, pressure, naive, dumb, average, slow burn, dangerous, possible transformation, realistic
creator: seldiora_alt
